name: Zucchini Crescent Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Unroll each crescent dough and arrange in a sprayed pie pan to form a crust.
Stretch the dough to fit and spread evenly. Seal the seams and crimp the rim. Brush mustard on the dough.
2. In a large skillet, heat some margarine over medium heat. Sauté the onion for about 2 minutes until softened.
Add the zucchini slices and sauté for another 2 minutes or until zucchini are tender but firm. Stir in basil, salt, pepper, garlic (if using), and oregano; add more margarine if needed.
3. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
4. In a large bowl, combine the shredded mozzarella cheese with lightly beaten eggs.
5. Pour the egg-cheese mixture into the pie pan over the sautéed zucchini and herbs.
6. Place the pie in the preheated oven and bake for about 20 minutes until set.
7. Allow the pie to cool for 10 minutes before serving.
